content:
struct SpanStats {
    pub count: u64,
    pub count_1h: u64,
    pub avg_ms: f64,
    pub last_ms: f64,
    pub errors: u64,
    #[serde(default)]
    pub p50_ms: f64,
    #[serde(default)]
    pub p95_ms: f64,
    #[serde(default)]
    pub p99_ms: f64,
}
pub struct TraceEvent {
    pub ts: String,
    pub level: String,
    pub module: String,
    pub msg: String,
}
pub struct TracesData {
    pub spans: HashMap<String, SpanStats>,
    pub recent_events: Vec<TraceEvent>,
}
